description: Build packages/ml-pipeline - Full ML infrastructure with feature store, model registry, training pipeline, inference engine, embedding store, anomaly detection, NLP models, time series forecasting, and AutoML
steps: Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/types.ts with all type definitions: Feature, FeatureSet, FeatureStoreConfig, ModelMetadata, ModelVersion, ModelStatus, TrainingConfig, TrainingResult, DataBatch, InferenceRequest, InferenceResult, Embedding, VectorIndex, AnomalyResult, SentimentResult, NEREntity, TimeSeriesPoint, Forecast, HyperParameter, CrossValidationResult, ModelDriftAlert

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/feature-store.ts - Feature computation (transform pipelines), feature storage (in-memory with TTL), feature serving (batch/real-time), feature versioning, feature statistics (mean, std, distribution), feature importance tracking. ~450 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/model-registry.ts - Model registration with metadata, versioning (semantic), deployment status tracking, A/B test allocation, rollback capability, model lineage tracking, model comparison. ~400 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/training-pipeline.ts - Data loading (batch iteration), train/test split, mini-batch processing, loss computation, gradient-like updates, evaluation metrics (accuracy, precision, recall, F1, AUC), early stopping, checkpoint saving. ~500 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/inference-engine.ts - Real-time inference (single prediction), batch inference (parallel processing), A/B model routing, model warm-up, response caching, latency tracking, fallback models. ~400 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/embedding-store.ts - Vector storage, cosine similarity search, LSH (locality-sensitive hashing) for ANN indexing, k-nearest neighbors, dimension reduction (random projection), index building/updating. ~500 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/text-embeddings.ts - Word2vec-style embeddings (skip-gram with negative sampling simplified), sentence embeddings (averaged word vectors), vocabulary management, tokenization, embedding lookup, similarity between texts. ~400 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/image-features.ts - CNN-like feature extraction (simplified convolution, pooling, flattening), feature vector generation, image preprocessing (resize, normalize), feature comparison, feature visualization metadata. ~350 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/anomaly-detector.ts - Isolation forest (random partitioning, anomaly scoring), z-score detection, moving average with deviation alerts, multi-variate anomaly detection, adaptive thresholds. ~450 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/spam-classifier.ts - Text feature extraction (TF-IDF-like), naive bayes classification, training on labeled data, spam probability scoring, configurable thresholds, false positive handling. ~400 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/sentiment-analyzer.ts - Lexicon-based sentiment (positive/negative word scoring), context-aware negation handling, aspect-based sentiment, confidence scoring, multi-language support structure. ~350 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/ner-engine.ts - Named entity recognition using rule-based + statistical patterns, entity types (person, org, location, date, money), entity linking, context window analysis. ~400 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/time-series-forecaster.ts - ARIMA-like forecasting (differencing, AR, MA components), exponential smoothing (simple, double, triple/Holt-Winters), seasonality detection, confidence intervals. ~450 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/automl-pipeline.ts - Hyperparameter search (grid search, random search), cross-validation (k-fold), model selection (comparison metrics), early termination of bad configs, search space definition. ~400 lines

Create packages/ml-pipeline/src/core/model-monitor.ts - Drift detection (population stability index, KL divergence), performance degradation alerts, feature distribution monitoring, prediction distribution monitoring, alert rules. ~400 lines
acceptance_criteria: packages/ml-pipeline/src/index.ts exists and exports all public APIs
EmbeddingStore implements LSH-based approximate nearest neighbor search
AnomalyDetector implements isolation forest with anomaly scoring
TimeSeriesForecaster implements exponential smoothing with seasonality
TrainingPipeline supports mini-batch processing with evaluation metrics
AutoMLPipeline implements grid/random search with cross-validation
All files are 300-500 lines with real mathematical implementations
findings: All 16 files created (types.ts + 14 core implementations + index.ts). Total 5076 lines added. Test passes with 25 packages validated. No warnings or errors.
